name: resources
description: Resource board (R8) + suggestion box (R9): member submit → instructor curate/triage. Pending visibility enforced in-query (P0); light per-tenant anti-spam via by_tenant_status (DATA-MODEL guard, not the rr rate-limit dep). Since 0.2.0 (#18): member upvotes on suggestions — idempotent toggle via suggestionVotes by_suggestion_user; derived counts, never stored. Two mounted views: ResourceBoardView, SuggestionBoxView.
notes: 0.1.0 (2026-07-06, agent epsilon): STATUS row #7 (v1.1). Owns resources + suggestions tables. submit=member, curate/triage=instructor+, pending items visible only to instructor+ and the submitter (enforced in-query). Anti-spam = DATA-MODEL pending-count guard, NO rr rate-limit dependency. Copy-first: board/card shapes adapted from rr `library` (index/card + props-driven copy override), not imported. Optional resources.courseId supported by the mutation but omitted from the v1 submit form UI; instructor triage covers open→planned/done/rejected. — 0.2.0 (2026-07-10, agent epsilon): STATUS row #18 (v1.2, fase-2). Adds suggestionVotes: votes:toggleVote (member; auth-before-read; tenantId from the suggestion row; idempotent via by_suggestion_user), suggestion lists enriched with { voteCount, myVote } + sorted voteCount desc then newest (bounded VOTE_COUNT_TAKE=500), SuggestionVoteButton + useToggleSuggestionVote (optimistic patch of both list queries). — 0.2.1 (2026-07-13, agent epsilon): STATUS row #22 (v1.3, fase-2). Notification producers, backend-only (no UI): resources:curate → resource_reviewed and suggestions:setStatus → suggestion_status, both scheduler → internal notify:create insert into the shared notifications table (no new tables). P0: actor is never notified about their own action (guard in scheduleNotify, tested); idempotent status re-set does not notify; href deep-link /resources/<tenantSlug>. TODO(rr): notify:create mirrors #21 notifications.create — alpha may repoint notifyCreateRef when the notifications feature lands.
